message:
refactor(db): remove SQL LIKE fallback and make lexical bridge the sole search path

The search service previously fell through to a SQL LIKE-based planner
when the Tantivy bridge was unavailable. This created a silent
degradation path that masked initialization failures and produced
inferior results without visibility.

Changes:
- Remove `execute_search_simple` SQL planner path; delegate to
  `execute_search` with default options so all surfaces share the
  same engine routing
- Add `ensure_lexical_bridge_initialized()` with lazy bootstrap for
  CLI/TUI surfaces that skip server startup
- Replace three-way JOIN in backfill with JOIN-free paged query plus
  `lookup_cached_text()` helper to avoid FrankenSQLite overhead
- Handle missing COUNT() support gracefully in backfill fast-path
- Extract `evaluate_check_rows()` from integrity module for reuse
- Remove dead code: `plan_param_to_value`, `map_sql_error`,
  `map_sql_outcome`, `acquire_conn`, row mapping functions
- Add dedicated semantic-only search path with result hydration
- Return hard errors instead of silent fallback when engine is
  unavailable

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    evaluate_check_rows(&rows, kind, duration_us)
+}
+
+/// Evaluate integrity/quick-check pragma rows and update global integrity metrics.
+///
+/// Shared helper to keep integrity semantics consistent across all callers.
+pub fn evaluate_check_rows(
+    rows: &[Row],
+    kind: CheckKind,
+    duration_us: u64,
+) -> DbResult<IntegrityCheckResult> {
     let mut details: Vec<String> = rows
         .iter()
         .filter_map(|r| {
